data.title: Iran Plans Sovereign Control Over Hormuz Strait, Awaits Parliamentary Approval
data.description: Iran is set to approve a plan for sovereign control over the Hormuz Strait, according to Salimi, a member of the Iranian Parliament's presidium. According to Odaily, the plan is expected to be passed as a permanent law. The Iranian Students' News Agency reported that Salimi stated only Iran and Oman have the authority to decide on the management of the Hormuz Strait. Iran has initiated communication with Oman, which has expressed preliminary agreement, and the plan is expected to be finalized soon.

data.title: Sean Bill Criticizes Bitcoin Acquisition Strategies
data.description: Sean Bill has expressed concerns regarding the strategies of many companies acquiring Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Bill noted that these firms often prioritize promotional efforts over developing substantive capabilities. He highlighted that numerous companies lack robust capital structures and are overly reliant on the appreciation of Bitcoin prices for their financial stability.

data.title: Alephium Token Bridge Hacked for $815,000
data.description: The Alephium token bridge has suffered a security breach resulting in a loss of approximately $815,000, according to Blockaid. The attacker managed to compromise three out of the four guardian keys of the bridge, leading to the unauthorized access and subsequent theft.

data.title: XRP ETFs See Inflows Amid Bitcoin and Ether Outflows
data.description: U.S.-listed spot XRP ETFs attracted $11.88 million in net inflows on May 29, contrasting with continued outflows from bitcoin and ether ETFs, according to CoinDesk. Bitwise's XRP ETF led with $7.36 million, followed by Canary's XRPC and Franklin's XRPZ. Total net assets in U.S. XRP ETFs reached $1.12 billion, about 1.37% of XRP's market value. From May 20 to May 29, XRP ETFs gained $35 million, while bitcoin ETFs lost $1.70 billion and ether ETFs shed $309 million, highlighting a divergence in institutional demand.

data.title: Ripple Aims to Raise $1 Billion for XRP Treasury
data.description: Ripple Labs is reportedly leading an initiative to raise at least $1 billion through a special purpose acquisition company to establish a public-market vehicle focused on accumulating XRP, according to CoinDesk. This proposed XRP-focused digital asset treasury would be the largest of its kind if completed, testing institutional demand for XRP amid a cooling market for digital asset treasuries. Ripple is expected to contribute some of its own XRP holdings to the vehicle. The terms are still under discussion and could change.

data.title: Binance App Introduces Prediction Markets for Eligible Users
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X that users can now access Prediction Markets through the Binance App. This feature is available to users in eligible regions, and they can participate by navigating through specific paths within the app.

To access the Prediction Markets, users can follow one of two paths. The first path is through the Exchange section: open the Binance App, go to Exchange, then Markets, and finally select Prediction. Alternatively, users can access it via the Wallet section: open the Binance App, navigate to Wallet, then Home, and select Prediction.

It is important for users to verify the availability of Prediction Markets in their region, as this feature is only accessible to users in eligible areas. The Binance App provides the necessary information for users to check regional availability. This new feature aims to enhance user engagement by offering a platform for market predictions within the app.

data.title: Defense Secretary Hegseth Discusses US-China Relations at Singapore Summit
data.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth addressed a security summit in Singapore over the weekend, focusing on the stability of U.S.-China relations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that Hegseth's speech included remarks on European allies but notably omitted any mention of Taiwan and the ongoing conflict in Iran. The absence of these topics in his address was significant given their current geopolitical relevance. Hegseth's comments come amid ongoing discussions about international security and diplomatic relations.

data.title: U.S. Navy Maintains Maritime Blockade on Iranian Ports
data.description: The U.S. Navy Central Command's Naval Cooperation and Guidance for Shipping (NCAGS) issued a shipping warning on the 30th, stating that the maritime blockade on Iranian ports remains in effect. According to Odaily, the restrictions cover the Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, Gulf of Oman, and parts of the northern Arabian Sea. On the same day, the Joint Maritime Information Center (JMIC) released an updated maritime security notice, maintaining the security threat level in these waters at 'severe.' Shipowners, operators, and crew members are advised to closely monitor changes in the regional security situation.

data.title: Justin Sun Receives $220 Million in SUSDS from Unknown Wallet
data.description: Whale Alert has reported a significant transfer involving 200,347,000 SUSDS from an unidentified wallet to Justin Sun. According to NS3.AI, the transaction is valued at approximately $220 million, highlighting notable activity in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Shiba Inu's Dramatic ROI: $13 Investment in 2020 Now Worth Over $1 Million
data.description: Shiba Inu, a popular cryptocurrency, was trading at approximately $0.00000000005637 on November 11, 2020. According to NS3.AI, Changelly's ROI calculator indicates that a $13 investment at that time would have grown to over $1 million today. Despite this impressive return, the token has experienced a significant decline, currently down about 94% from its all-time high of $0.00008616 in 2021.

data.title: AI TRENDS | China's First Green AI Platform Launches Nationwide
data.description: China has launched its first comprehensive green AI platform, addressing the gap in regional one-stop computing model token services. According to Odaily, the platform integrates core functions such as computing power scheduling, intelligent model invocation, and token transaction settlement. This development comes as the construction of a nationwide integrated computing network accelerates and the AI industry continues to grow, with increasing demand for token invocation. The platform aims to provide a full-chain AI service system, supporting various market entities, including government bodies and research institutions.

data.title: XZ Navigator Launches on BNB Chain
data.description:
XZ Navigator, a platform integrating outdoor experiences with digital assets, has officially launched on the BNB Chain. According to ChainCatcher, the platform aims to tokenize real-world resources such as offline cultural tourism IPs, event rights, and outdoor campsites for global outdoor enthusiasts and high-net-worth individuals. 

The core ecosystem of XZ Navigator includes global outdoor route IPs, elite social circles, and RWA digital asset empowerment. The platform's long-term goal is to establish a global network covering 100 countries, 100 selected routes, and 1 million users. The XZ Token will serve as the core digital rights carrier within the ecosystem, supporting identity verification, event participation, rights transfer, community incentives, and ecosystem governance.

data.title: Kalshi Launches American Power Index to Track Political Dynamics
data.description: Kalshi has announced the launch of the Kalshi American Power Index on the X platform. According to Odaily, this index is designed to monitor shifts in power between the Democratic and Republican parties, earning the nickname 'the S&P 500 of politics.' The index ranges from +50D, indicating complete Democratic control, to +50R, indicating complete Republican control. It combines forward-looking market signals with current realities, with the 'future' component reflecting market expectations for the direction of political power.

data.title: EU Considers Unified Tax System for Crypto Industry
data.description:
The European Union is evaluating the possibility of incorporating the cryptocurrency industry into a unified tax system, according to a document submitted by the European Commission to member states and the European Parliament. This initiative aims to identify new sources of fiscal revenue for the 2028-2034 budget cycle. 

According to ChainCatcher, the document estimates that imposing a 0.1% tax on cryptocurrency transaction volumes could generate approximately 3 billion to 4 billion euros annually for the EU. Additionally, taxing crypto capital gains could potentially add around 1 billion to 2.4 billion euros in annual revenue.

However, the European Commission has noted that due to incomplete data related to the crypto industry, there is significant uncertainty in these revenue forecasts, and actual outcomes may differ from the estimates.

The proposal is still in the evaluation phase and would require unanimous approval from all 27 EU member states to be implemented. If successful, this could become one of the most significant discussions on a unified tax policy for the crypto industry within the EU.

data.title: Beldex Introduces BNS Marketplace for Blockchain-Based Name Management
data.description: Beldex has unveiled the BNS Marketplace, a peer-to-peer platform designed for the buying, selling, and management of blockchain-based names. According to NS3.AI, this new marketplace allows users to link BNS names with BChat IDs, BelNet IDs, and Beldex wallet addresses, enhancing the integration and utility of blockchain identities.

data.title: Iranian Military Advisor Criticizes U.S. President's Diplomatic Actions
data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader's military advisor, Mohsen Rezaei, expressed criticism on social media on the 30th, stating that U.S. President Donald Trump is engaging in what he described as a 'third betrayal of diplomacy.' According to Odaily, Rezaei accused the U.S. President of continuing a maritime blockade and making excessive demands, suggesting that these actions indicate a lack of genuine interest in negotiating with Iran, but rather pursuing other objectives.

data.title: Loracle's Short Positions in HYPE, VVV, and LIT Show Unrealized Loss
data.description: Hyperbot data indicates that Loracle has slightly decreased its short positions in HYPE, VVV, and LIT. According to NS3.AI, the overall position is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of approximately $34.54 million, with an investment return rate of -181.14%.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Companies Face Structural Challenges, Sean Bill Says
data.description: Sean Bill has highlighted that numerous Bitcoin treasury companies are struggling with inadequate capital structures and the capability to effectively deploy Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, BitcoinTreasuries data reveals that approximately 198 public companies collectively hold around 1.25 million BTC.

data.title: Polymarket Updates Platform with New Features and Improvements
data.description: Polymarket has released updates on its platform developments for the week. According to Odaily, the updates include the launch of a World Cup page with functionality testing, the introduction of perpetual contracts featuring five traditional financial trading pairs and a BTC perpetual contract, and performance optimization of the Central Limit Order Book (CLOB) with a planned release next week to address queue congestion issues. Additionally, the platform has open-sourced its SDK, initiated a unified API, and implemented Gamma fixes and improvements, including stricter keyset pagination and high-traffic read path indexing, along with production correctness fixes for users, profiles, comments, and sports summaries.

data.title: STOCKS | Goldman Sachs Raises 2026 S&P 500 Forecast to 8,000
data.description: Goldman Sachs has increased its year-end forecast for the S&P 500 index in 2026 to 8,000, up from the previous estimate of 7,600. According to NS3.AI, the financial institution also adjusted its earnings-per-share forecast for the index to $340 for the same year. Goldman Sachs highlighted the significant role of AI infrastructure companies, which are expected to contribute approximately half of the index's earnings growth this year.
